title: Si Sa Ket Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Si Sa Ket with a Z-Score of +3.57. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Si Sa Ket has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 11.5 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remains at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80% and the wind speed is moderate at 14.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave effects.
